variant_description: Accentuation-optimized flavor: UPOS normalized to Lithuanian traditional grammar categories (DET folded into PRON, AUX into VERB — the VDU dictionary's label space). This is the variant used by the Kirčiuoklė accentuation pipeline.

full_test_bench.protocol: 684-sentence UD_Lithuanian-ALKSNIS gold test, raw-text input, letter-token alignment, VDU-convention slots projection

accentuation_quality.wikipedia_corpus_choices_vs_production: 323/370 (86.5%) — equal to the internal UDPipe-taught reference model; remaining disagreements split both ways on manual review
accentuation_quality.note: For the accentuation task this variant matches the best internal model; the treebank slots number is lower than the -ud variant's because this variant deliberately keeps corpus-independent conventions rather than ALKSNIS-specific annotation habits.

lineage: Fully permissive: gold MATAS v3.0 (CC BY 4.0) + gold UD_Lithuanian-ALKSNIS (CC BY-SA 4.0), UD FEATS reconstructed deterministically from MATAS's Jablonskis XPOS, remaining contextual gaps filled by iterated constrained-decoding self-training (no UDPipe or other NC-licensed model anywhere in the lineage), base encoder EMBEDDIA/litlat-bert (CC BY-SA 4.0).
speed_hardware: ONNX Runtime INT8, single CPU thread pool, consumer laptop
